args.code: (()=>{const root=document.documentElement;const rs=getComputedStyle(root);const body=getComputedStyle(document.body);const nav=document.querySelector('nav');const activeBtn=nav?Array.from(nav.querySelectorAll('button')).find(b=>getComputedStyle(b).backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'):null;const card=document.querySelector('div.w-full.max-w-lg');const innerCard=document.querySelector('div.inline-flex');const glass=document.querySelector('div[class*="glass"],div[class*="backdrop"]');const allSpans=document.querySelectorAll('span');const proSpans=Array.from(allSpans).filter(s=>s.textContent.trim()==='PRO');const h1=document.querySelector('h1');const h2=document.querySelector('h2');const h3=document.querySelector('h3');const p=document.querySelector('p');const small=document.querySelector('small');const label=document.querySelector('label');const caption=document.querySelector('[class*="caption"]');return JSON.stringify({tokens:{border:rs.getPropertyValue('--border'),card:rs.getPropertyValue('--card'),background:rs.getPropertyValue('--background'),foreground:rs.getPropertyValue('--foreground'),primary:rs.getPropertyValue('--primary'),primaryForeground:rs.getPropertyValue('--primary-foreground'),secondary:rs.getPropertyValue('--secondary'),secondaryForeground:rs.getPropertyValue('--secondary-foreground'),muted:rs.getPropertyValue('--muted'),mutedForeground:rs.getPropertyValue('--muted-foreground'),accent:rs.getPropertyValue('--accent'),accentForeground:rs.getPropertyValue('--accent-foreground'),destructive:rs.getPropertyValue('--destructive'),destructiveForeground:rs.getPropertyValue('--destructive-foreground'),ring:rs.getPropertyValue('--ring'),radius:rs.getPropertyValue('--radius')},colors:{bodyBg:body.backgroundColor,bodyColor:body.color,navBg:nav?getComputedStyle(nav).backgroundColor:null,activeBtnBg:activeBtn?getComputedStyle(activeBtn).backgroundColor:null,activeBtnColor:activeBtn?getComputedStyle(activeBtn).color:null,cardBg:card?getComputedStyle(card).backgroundColor:null,cardBorder:card?getComputedStyle(card).border:null,innerCardBg:innerCard?getComputedStyle(innerCard).backgroundColor:null,innerCardBorder:innerCard?getComputedStyle(innerCard).border:null},typography:{h1:h1?{text:h1.textContent.trim().slice(0,40),fontSize:getComputedStyle(h1).fontSize,fontWeight:getComputedStyle(h1).fontWeight,lineHeight:getComputedStyle(h1).lineHeight}:null,h2:h2?{text:h2?h2.textContent.trim().slice(0,40):null,fontSize:h2?getComputedStyle(h2).fontSize:null,fontWeight:h2?getComputedStyle(h2).fontWeight:null}:null,h3:h3?{text:h3?h3.textContent.trim().slice(0,40):null,fontSize:h3?getComputedStyle(h3).fontSize:null,fontWeight:h3?getComputedStyle(h3).fontWeight:null}:null,p:p?{fontSize:getComputedStyle(p).fontSize,lineHeight:getComputedStyle(p).lineHeight}:null,small:small?{fontSize:getComputedStyle(small).fontSize,lineHeight:getComputedStyle(small).lineHeight}:null,label:label?{fontSize:getComputedStyle(label).fontSize,lineHeight:getComputedStyle(label).lineHeight}:null,caption:caption?{fontSize:getComputedStyle(caption).fontSize,lineHeight:getComputedStyle(caption).lineHeight}:null},proSpans:proSpans.map(s=>({bg:getComputedStyle(s).backgroundColor,color:getComputedStyle(s).color,br:getComputedStyle(s).borderRadius,padding:getComputedStyle(s).padding,fontSize:getComputedStyle(s).fontSize})),glass:glass?{bg:getComputedStyle(glass).backgroundColor,backdrop:getComputedStyle(glass).backdropFilter,border:getComputedStyle(glass).border,br:getComputedStyle(glass).borderRadius}:null});})()
